assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Create a free InfluxDB Cloud Serverless account and write the official home-sensor sample to the default bucket in the UI.

first_success.outcome: The developer writes InfluxData's published home-sensor line protocol sample to the automatically created default bucket through the UI.
first_success.observable_signal: After Write Data is selected, the UI confirms that the data has been written successfully.

route_selection.surface: InfluxDB Cloud Serverless Free Plan through InfluxData signup and UI
route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: InfluxData Free Plan email or social signup then UI write
candidates.reason: Email versus Google or Microsoft signup changes fields; password rules and verification recovery are incompletely documented.

candidates.name: AWS Marketplace Usage-Based signup
candidates.reason: Requires AWS billing and is not the no-card Free Plan route documented for getting started without marketplace entitlement.

required_path.action: Sign up for InfluxDB Cloud Serverless through InfluxData.

required_fields.label: Password
required_fields.notes: Complexity rules are not fully published.

required_path.observable_result: An InfluxDB Cloud account is created and email verification is required for email signup.

required_path.action: Verify the email address when using email signup.
Complete Cloud setup for the Free Plan organization and default resources.

required_fields.label: Organization or setup choices presented after signup

required_path.observable_result: A default bucket and UI workspace are available.

required_path.action: Write the published home-sensor sample through the UI Write Data flow.
required_path.observable_result: The UI confirms the sample was written successfully.

prerequisites.description: Free Plan users are limited to one organization.

unavoidable_waits.description: Email verification delivery for email signup.

platform_outcomes.description: InfluxDB Cloud creates the Free Plan organization and default bucket.

excluded.reason: Signup guide labels CLI download optional.

sources.title: Sign up for InfluxDB Cloud Serverless
Get started with InfluxDB Cloud Serverless

uncertainties.question: What password rules and post-signup setup fields appear for email versus social signup?
uncertainties.impact: Missing controls block verified field counts and route selection.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Fresh-account capture of both signup methods through first successful UI write.

uncertainties.question: What exact name is assigned to the automatically created default bucket?
uncertainties.impact: Affects whether the documented write path needs rename or selection steps.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Observed default bucket naming for a new Free Plan organization.
